extName.description: Extension name shown in Chrome and Web Store.

extDescription.message: Auto-close and suspend idle tabs, and switch between recent tabs with an Arc-style MRU overlay.
extDescription.description: Short description shown in Chrome and Web Store (under 132 chars).

cmdCloseInactiveNow.message: Close inactive tabs that exceed the threshold right now
cmdCloseInactiveNow.description: Description for the close-inactive-now keyboard command.

cmdCloseDuplicates.description: Description for the close-duplicates keyboard command.

cmdCloseAllWindow.message: Close all tabs in the current window (no default key — assign one in chrome://extensions/shortcuts)
cmdCloseAllWindow.description: Description for the close-all-window keyboard command.

cmdSwitchTabFallback.description: Description for the switch-tab-fallback keyboard command.

cmdSwitchTabFallbackPrev.description: Description for the switch-tab-fallback-prev keyboard command.

cmdOpenSearchPalette.description: Description for the open-search-palette keyboard command.
